artifact: Dao De Jing 1 — The Nameless Gate
original: 道可道，非常道。名可名，非常名。
english: The way that can be fixed as a way is not the constant Way.
spanish: El camino que puede fijarse como camino no es el Camino constante.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 1
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF used only as comparative witness, pp. 35-36; promoted row should prefer Chinese canonical anchor and working renderings.

artifact: Dao De Jing 2 — Mutual Arising
original: 有無相生，難易相成。
english: Being and nonbeing give birth to one another; difficult and easy complete one another.
spanish: Ser y no-ser se engendran mutuamente; difícil y fácil se completan.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 2
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 37-38.

artifact: Dao De Jing 3 — Not Exalting Talent
original: 不尚賢，使民不爭。
english: Do not exalt the clever, and people do not turn life into contest.
spanish: No exaltes al listo, y la gente no convertirá la vida en competencia.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 3
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 39-40.

artifact: Dao De Jing 4 — Blunt the Sharpness
original: 挫其銳，解其紛，和其光，同其塵。
english: Blunt the sharpness, loosen the knots, soften the glare, join the dust.
spanish: Embota lo afilado, desata los nudos, suaviza el brillo, únete al polvo.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 4
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 41-42.

artifact: Dao De Jing 5 — Keep the Center
original: 多言數窮，不如守中。
english: Many words run out; nothing is better than keeping the center.
spanish: Muchas palabras se agotan; nada vale más que guardar el centro.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 5
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 42-43.

artifact: Dao De Jing 6 — Valley Spirit
original: 谷神不死，是謂玄牝。
english: The valley spirit does not die; it is called the mysterious female.
spanish: El espíritu del valle no muere; se llama la hembra misteriosa.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 6
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, p. 43.

artifact: Dao De Jing 7 — Not Living for Itself
original: 以其不自生，故能長生。
english: Because heaven and earth do not live for themselves, they endure.
spanish: Porque cielo y tierra no viven para sí mismos, perduran.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 7
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 44-45.

artifact: Dao De Jing 8 — Highest Good as Water
original: 上善若水。水善利萬物而不爭。
english: The highest good is like water: it benefits all beings and does not contend.
spanish: El bien más alto es como el agua: beneficia a todos los seres y no compite.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 8
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 45-46.

artifact: Dao De Jing 9 — Withdraw When Complete
original: 功遂身退，天之道。
english: When the work is complete, withdraw: this is the way of heaven.
spanish: Cuando la obra está completa, retírate: ese es el camino del cielo.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 9
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, p. 47.

artifact: Dao De Jing 10 — Profound Virtue
original: 生而不有，為而不恃，長而不宰，是謂玄德。
english: Create without possession, act without claim, guide without domination.
spanish: Crea sin poseer, actúa sin reclamar, guía sin dominar.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 10
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 48-49.

artifact: Dao De Jing 11 — Usefulness of Emptiness
original: 故有之以為利，無之以為用。
english: What exists gives value; what is empty gives use.
spanish: Lo que existe da valor; lo vacío da uso.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 11
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 50-51.

artifact: Dao De Jing 12 — Inner Over Visible
original: 是以聖人為腹，不為目。故去彼取此。
english: The sage cares for the inner life, not the hungry eye.
spanish: El sabio cuida la vida interior, no el ojo hambriento.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 12
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 51-52.

artifact: Dao De Jing 13 — World as Body
original: 貴以身為天下，若可寄天下；愛以身為天下，若可託天下。
english: Value the world as your body; love the world as your body.
spanish: Valora el mundo como tu cuerpo; ama el mundo como tu cuerpo.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 13
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 52-53.

artifact: Dao De Jing 14 — Hold the Ancient Way
original: 執古之道，以御今之有。
english: Hold the ancient Way to move through what exists now.
spanish: Sostén el Camino antiguo para atravesar lo que existe ahora.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 14
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 54-56.

artifact: Dao De Jing 15 — Muddy Water Clears
original: 孰能濁以靜之徐清？孰能安以動之徐生？
english: Who can let muddy water be still until it slowly clears?
spanish: ¿Quién puede dejar quieta el agua turbia hasta que lentamente aclare?
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 15
notes: Mode A queue. Archangelis PDF comparative witness, pp. 56-58.

artifact: Dao De Jing 16 — Returning to the Root
original: 致虛極，守靜篤。萬物並作，吾以觀復。
english: Reach utmost emptiness, keep deep stillness, and watch all things return.
spanish: Llega al vacío extremo, guarda quietud profunda y observa todo retornar.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 16
notes: Mode A queue. Chapter beyond shown excerpt; anchored to canonical Chinese source, with Archangelis PDF queued for later page cross-check.

artifact: Dao De Jing 17 — Barely Known
original: 太上，下知有之。
english: The highest ruler is barely known to exist.
spanish: El gobernante más alto apenas se sabe que existe.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 17
notes: Mode A queue. Anchored to canonical Chinese source; queued for later page cross-check.

artifact: Dao De Jing 18 — When the Great Way Declines
original: 大道廢，有仁義。智慧出，有大偽。
english: When the great Way is abandoned, virtue becomes a name and cleverness breeds falsehood.
spanish: Cuando se abandona el gran Camino, la virtud se vuelve nombre y la astucia engendra falsedad.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 18
notes: Mode A queue. Anchored to canonical Chinese source; queued for later page cross-check.

artifact: Dao De Jing 19 — Cut Off Cleverness
original: 絕聖棄智，民利百倍。
english: Cut off sanctified cleverness, and people benefit a hundredfold.
spanish: Corta la astucia santificada, y la gente gana cien veces.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 19
notes: Mode A queue. Anchored to canonical Chinese source; queued for later page cross-check.

artifact: Dao De Jing 20 — End Learning
original: 絕學無憂。
english: End compulsive learning, and anxiety loses its throne.
spanish: Cesa el aprendizaje compulsivo, y la ansiedad pierde su trono.
recommendedEditionSource: Chinese Text Project — Dao De Jing 20
notes: Mode A queue. Anchored to canonical Chinese source; queued for later page cross-check.
